vectors.notes: Real mainnet Top Shot Moment 40105574 at holder 0x0bb3b2a249ca6822 (Set 90, serial 1112 of 16000, Sam Hauser 3 Pointer). Fixture captures the live Flow REST response + the raw IPFS block. A third party MAY re-run live with `OPO_LIVE=1 node conformance/run.js adapters/flow-topshot/verify.js`; the recorded fixture SHALL round-trip offline.
Synthetic derivative of pass-1 with serial patched to 99999 (> edition_size 16000). Exercises SPEC §4 step 2.
Real Flow response + IPFS raw block with a single trailing byte appended. sha256 no longer matches the multihash digest declared by CIDv0 QmQbn…smKR — exercises SPEC §4 step 3.

Real mainnet Azuki #9999 at 0x4b0207e11661e41b091697980b3d49bd59358d7c. tokenURI returns `ipfs://QmZcH4Yv…3u4/9999` (directory + path); the adapter resolves the leaf metadata CID `Qme4i1j…Fps`, hashes the raw block against that CID, extracts `image: ipfs://QmYDvP…1hg/9999.png`, resolves the image root CID `QmfQbR…6Kr`, and hashes that block. Live re-run: `OPO_LIVE=1 node conformance/run.js adapters/erc721-generic/verify.js --vector erc721-azuki-9999-pass`.

Real RPC + metadata fixture for Azuki #9999 with a single 0xFF byte appended to the image root block `QmfQbR…6Kr`. sha256 no longer matches the declared multihash digest — exercises SPEC §4 step 3 for a path-resolved media leaf.

Two-of-two gateway agreement. Primary gateway gateway.pinata.cloud (Pinata Cloud, Inc.) and independent second gateway ipfs.io (Interplanetary Shipyard) both advertise the same leaf CIDs for Azuki #9999's metadata and image paths. Probed live 2026-04-23: gateway.pinata.cloud returns the leaf CID via `etag: "<cid>.raw"` on path-style GET (200 + raw bytes); ipfs.io returns `x-ipfs-roots: QmZcH4YvBVVRJtdn4RdbaqgspFU8gH6P9vomDpBVpAL3u4,Qme4i1jbJvY8mfDWfFXLKh1ZLy1WtKh4edHXdFWfA61Fps` via HEAD (GET 406s through its trustless-gateway.link redirect). The secondary is probed with HEAD because the cross-check only needs the header-advertised leaf CID, not bytes. Exercises SPEC v0.4 §5 trust-assumption strengthening.

Synthetic fixture where the second gateway returns a different leaf CID for the tokenURI directory path. Models a substitution attack scenario: a compromised primary gateway returns bytes that hash to a substituted leaf CID; the independent second gateway's path resolution disagrees, and the verifier fails step 3 on `crosscheck mismatch`. Exercises SPEC v0.4 §4 step 3 crosscheck branch.
